summary: Iteration 38 (Phase D · Live Staffing Operations) — full backend + frontend e2e verification. 12/12 Iter38 pytest tests PASS and 33/33 regression (iter34-37) PASS. Frontend manager + staff flows verified end-to-end including clock-in/out lifecycle with live UI feedback.

issues: Workflow shortcut tile testid is 'link-staffing-inspection' but the review request expected 'ofsted-staffing' — cosmetic naming mismatch only; the link to /ofsted works correctly.

action_items: (Optional/minor) Either rename data-testid='link-staffing-inspection' to 'ofsted-staffing' to match documentation or update the spec — not blocking.
critical_code_review_comments: LiveStaffingOps.jsx is 463 lines including a nested DisturbanceModal — borderline acceptable but worth splitting DisturbanceModal/MyShiftBar into separate files if it grows.
Backend server.py is now very large with iter38 block at L8123-8470; consider extracting staffing routes into a router module for maintainability.
Sleep-in disturbance 'Log dist.' button only renders when is_sleep_in && clocked_in && isManager — correct behaviour; no demo data currently triggers it (confirmed via backend pytest).
seed_data_creation: None created — used existing seed (intentional 1 coverage gap from un-clocked-in staff shift, as noted by main agent).
verified_features: GET /api/staffing/overview — payload shape (on_shift_now, next_24h, coverage_gaps, ratios, pressure, config, is_asleep_window) for any auth role
POST /api/shifts/{id}/clock-in — self-only (403 otherwise), returns clock_in_variance_minutes, double-clock rejected
POST /api/shifts/{id}/clock-out — returns actual_minutes_worked, cannot clock-out twice
POST /api/shifts/{id}/disturbance — increments disturbance_count, sets is_sleep_in, flows to overview
POST /api/leave-requests full lifecycle (create, list scoped, approve/reject RBAC, cannot approve twice, cancel)
POST /api/shift-swaps full lifecycle (pending_target → pending_manager → approved, shift.staff_id reassignment, cannot swap on started shift)
Frontend /staff-operations Rota & Shifts tab renders live-staffing-ops, coverage-gaps, on-shift-now, staffing-ratios, pressure-indicators (all data-testid found)
MyShiftBar (staff) — Clock in button → Clock out toggle with toast + clocked_in time displayed
/leave-requests — Manager sees 'My requests / Pending approval / All' tabs; Staff sees only 'My requests'; Request modal opens
/shift-swaps — Request swap modal opens; correct empty state ('You have no upcoming shifts to swap.') when manager has no swappable shift
Regression: Shift Handover / Supervisions / Training / Team Wellbeing / Safer Recruitment sub-tabs all render; /ofsted command centre still renders
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter38 fully verified. Notifications still MOCKED (notifications_service.send_email / send_sms — queued for Iter 39). Disturbance UI button only appears when a shift is is_sleep_in AND clocked_in AND user is manager+ — seed data does not currently trigger this; backend pytest covers it. Sidebar locked at 7 items (Dashboard, Children's Services, Adult Services, Home Operations, Staff Operations, Compliance & Oversight, Admin). Public URL: https://safeguard-dash-1.preview.emergentagent.com
